prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名（中国石油 大学（北京）主榜）2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62区间，学校层次较高；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常记录中均未出现明显信号，声誉平稳 ，无重大舆情事件，报考心理无明显扰动。该校以石油石化特色见长，石油工程、化学工程与工艺等为传统优势方向，但第五轮学科评 估数据未收录该校独立条目。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度中，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科大类持续高热推荐，该校开设的计算机类、自动化、人工 智能等专业受益于整体热度；石油工程、化学工程与工艺等传统工科热度一般。本省2026年高考总人数约609800人，较2025年明显增加；按近年比例估算物理类约364660人，较20 25年363040人略有增加（+1620人），竞争小幅加剧；该校位于新疆克拉玛依市，与河北省跨省距离较远，地域偏好对河北考生 吸引力有限，可能对报考热度产生一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年小幅扩招（+2.87%）、本省物理类考生略有增加以及学校地处偏远等 因素，考虑考生规模增加和地域偏好的有限影响，预测2026年物理类最低位次约58031名，区间57531–58531名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 47376 → 43628 → 40851 → 44969 → 56852, showing a year-by-year upward trend from 2021 to 2023 (decreasing ranking numbers), a slight decline in 2024, and a significant decline to 56852 in 2025, with a recent decline of about 11883 places and large fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is about 56852; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 133 in 2021, 143 in 2022, 146 in 2023, 201 in 2024, and 209 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 215, an increase of 6 (+2.87%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings (China University of Petroleum (Beijing) main ranking), it ranked approximately 62nd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range, indicating a relatively high school level; the university has shown no obvious signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing records, with a stable reputation and no major public opinion incidents, causing no significant psychological disturbance in applications. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum engineering, chemical engineering and technology as traditional advantageous directions, but the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include an independent entry for this campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering categories continue to be highly recommended; the university offers computer science, automation, artificial intelligence and other majors benefiting from overall popularity; traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering and technology have average popularity. The total number of high school examinees in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, a significant increase from 2025; estimated Physics Category examinees are about 364,660 based on recent proportions, a slight increase (+1,620) from 363,040 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Hebei Province, with limited regional appeal to Hebei candidates, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in 2025 rankings, slight expansion in 2026 (+2.87%), slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and the remote location of the school, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 58,031, with a range of 57,531–58,531.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 57,531–58,531, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Statistics, Accounting, Chemical Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Automation, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Petroleum Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Exploration, Resources, Environment, Foreign Languages) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<57,531), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>58,531), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 8723 → 7438 → 7581 → 8144 → 7696, fluctuating within the 7400–8700 range overall, with the lowest in 2022 (7438th) and the highest in 2021 (8723rd), and narrow fluctuations within the 7600–8100 range in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7696th; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing continuous expansion followed by stabilization; the 2026 plan is 34, an increase of 5 (+17.24%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, leading to notably intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking (main ranking of China University of Petroleum (Beijing)), it is approximately 62nd, with stable rankings in recent years and a relatively high school level; no significant signals have appeared in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing records, indicating stable reputation, no major public opinion events, and no obvious psychological disturbance in application behavior.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, among major popularity levels, Accounting/Finance/Auditing categories are recommended, Chinese Language/Literature categories are recommended, Law categories are divided and wait-and-see, and Finance/Economics categories are divided and wait-and-see; the History Category majors offered at this university, such as Accounting, Economics, Finance, and Chinese Language and Literature, benefit from overall popularity; majors like Ideological and Political Education, Russian, and English have average popularity. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is approximately 609,800, with an estimated History Category of about 245,140 based on recent proportions, a slight increase (+1,426) compared to 243,714 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Hebei Province across provinces, and regional preference has limited appeal to Hebei candidates, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm to some extent.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of the 2025 ranking within the 7600–8100 range, the significant expansion in 2026 (+17.24%), the slight increase in History Category examinees in the province, and the remote location of the university, with the large expansion being the main influencing factor, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 8542nd, with a range of 8042–9042nd.
